  1. Description

Interface HardwareActionMatcher

All Superinterfaces:
HardwareInputMatcher
public interface HardwareActionMatcher extends HardwareInputMatcher
Defines a means of recognizing when a HardwareAction happens based on some hardware input. For example, when a certain MIDI CC message happens.
Since:
API version 10
See Also:
  • MidiIn.createActionMatcher(String)
